name: User Added to an Administrator's Azure AD Role
notes: Detect and alert when a user is added to a privileged Azure AD role (such as Global Administrator, Exchange Administrator, etc.).
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Health360
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Azure Platform
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Account Added

when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%add member to role.%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%azureactivedirectory%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%admins%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%administrator%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY User Added to an Administrator's Azure AD Role on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Health360
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Azure Platform
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Account Added

AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%add member to role.%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%azureactivedirectory%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%admins%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%administrator%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: User Added to an Administrator's Azure AD Role
Event description: Detect and alert when a user is added to a privileged Azure AD role (such as Global Administrator, Exchange Administrator, etc.).
